TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qoyaw ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 23 buwan, 43 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 36 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%.
S.PHON: alaŋ qojaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%.
S.FORM: alang Qoyaw ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 23 buwan, 43 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 36 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 84%.
S.PHON: alaŋ qojaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%.
